component.name: TransactionController
component.description: Exposes REST API endpoints POST /api/v1/transactions and GET /api/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}

component.name: Use Cases
component.description: CreateTransactionUseCase, GetTransactionUseCase - orchestrate flow and validation

component.name: Domain
component.description: Transaction, Customer, TransactionStatus - business rules and validation

component.name: Persistence Adapter
component.description: JPA / Hibernate entities TransactionEntity, CustomerEntity - responsible for database mapping

component.name: Payment Providers
component.description: PayuAdapter, StripeAdapter - implement PaymentProviderPort and are registered by PaymentProviderFactory

component.name: Event Publisher
component.description: KafkaEventPublisher implements EventPublisherPort to publish events to Kafka topics

component.name: Metrics
component.description: Micrometer metrics exposed via Actuator Prometheus

flow.description: HTTP request -> DTO -> mapper -> Use Case execution
Persist transaction before sending to provider
Record counters and timers (total, success, failed, processing_time)
